notes.zh: 主标签按可用频段 6-24 GHz 计算，比较非周期五单元超胞与同中心参数五单元超胞基准在 SZmax(2),Zmin(1) 通道上的平均幅值绝对差。
notes.en: The primary label is computed over the available 6-24 GHz band as the mean absolute magnitude difference between the nonperiodic five-cell supercell and the same-center five-cell supercell baseline on the SZmax(2),Zmin(1) channel.
